meta.description: Interactive preview of the Next.js template: pages, admin, forum and news are sample content to replace for your server.

betaBanner.title: Template demonstration site.
betaBanner.description: All content is fictional: browse pages to see the UI, then clone the GitHub repository.

welcomeBanner.defaultMessage: Welcome to the hub demo — copy is sample data editable in the admin.

errorPage.title: An error prevented rendering
errorPage.storageHint: If you customized the site in admin: try clearing the local storage (F12 → Application → Local Storage → delete « <key>rp-site-config-full</key> ») then reload.

hubOpenSource.metaTitle: Open-source hub — Next.js template for FiveM communities
hubOpenSource.metaDescription: Showcase site, admin panel, forum, Discord/Steam auth: open-source project you can fork for your RP server — not a server recruitment ad.
hubOpenSource.title: FiveM community hub — open-source template
hubOpenSource.subtitle: This page describes the GitHub repo and the live technical demo. It is not advertising a specific server: it is a template for creators and staff.
hubOpenSource.intro1: Need a full website for your FiveM community without starting from scratch? This repo ships a Next.js 15 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript and Tailwind base: public pages, theming, FR/EN i18n, content admin, built-in forum, Discord and Steam authentication.
hubOpenSource.intro2: This live instance is a technical showcase: replace name, logo, colours and content from the admin or by forking the repository.
hubOpenSource.intro3: Use the section below to copy a direct link to this page when posting on forum.cfx.re or elsewhere — readers immediately see it is about the technical project, not player recruitment.
hubOpenSource.stackDescription: Modern, typed, deployable on Vercel or Node.
stackItems: Tailwind CSS 4, editable theme and colours
Embedded forum (configurable storage), news, gallery, support tickets
API routes (contact, uploads, live FiveM server via Cfx.re / players.json)
hubOpenSource.featuresDescription: Typical RP hub pages and modules — everything is optional or overridable.

features.title: Content without redeploying
features.description: Copy, navigation, announcements, FAQ, rules, social links: much of it is driven from the admin panel (local storage / JSON export depending on your setup).

features.title: Internationalisation
features.description: Two built-in languages (FR/EN) with explicit URL prefixes to avoid mixed locales.

features.title: Forum & community
features.description: Built-in forum, notifications, categories — useful for intros, staff applications and help.

features.title: FiveM integrations
features.description: Server status (players, slots) via Cfx.re API and/or players.json endpoint — wire it to your server.

hubOpenSource.audienceDescription: Server creators, web developers and staff teams who want a clean, maintainable site.
audienceItems: You want to document your RP project with a serious site (rules, news, Tebex shop, contact).
You prefer open code you can audit and extend rather than an opaque CMS.
You post on forum.cfx.re to share a tool with the community, not a “join my server” ad.
hubOpenSource.selfHostDescription: Repository README: install, environment variables, build and Vercel deployment.
hubOpenSource.selfHostBody: Fork or clone https://github.com/kaazuke/harrata-city , configure OAuth secrets and URLs, then deploy. You are not required to keep the sample branding — replace name, logo and content in config.
hubOpenSource.forumShareDescription: Paste this URL in your topic (Releases, resources, or project showcase — follow forum rules). It points to this explanatory page, not a server ad.
hubOpenSource.legal: Independent community project. Grand Theft Auto V and related marks belong to their owners. Not affiliated with Rockstar Games, Cfx.re or FiveM — see the repository README.

errors.discord_state: Discord login cancelled or invalid session.

hero.title: Harrata City
hero.tagline: The city never sleeps. Your story might.
hero.description: Title and slogan come from config: here they illustrate a typical instance. Replace them with your community name and pitch.
hero.demoRibbon: You are browsing an open-source template demo — no RP server is promoted here.

why.title: What this demo shows
why.description: Sample tiles and copy: the admin panel lets you adapt lore, Discord / Cfx.re links, Tebex, theme and navigation.

features.title: RP Quality
features.description: Coherent scenes, fair-play and responsive staff for lasting immersion.

features.title: Living economy
features.description: Legal & illegal jobs, controlled money flows, RP-minded anti-grind.

features.title: Factions & companies
features.description: Playable structures, documents, territories and narrative events.

features.title: Optimized map
features.description: Performance, clean props, clear RP zones and polished MLOs.

forum.title: Forum (sample)
forum.description: Fictional threads to showcase the built-in forum — data follows your site configuration.
forum.joinDiscussionDescription: Ready for intros, help and applications once the site is yours.

stats.title: Statistics (overview)
stats.description: Example numbers — replace them with your data (API, database) from the site configuration.

presentation.title: Showcase page (sample content)
presentation.subtitle: These blocks show how to structure lore, strengths and media. Replace everything with your real project.
presentation.economyBlurb: Sample paragraph: here you would describe your server's economy or gameplay. Statistics on the site are also fictional.
presentation.mediaDescription: Illustration images / videos — replace with your in-game captures from the admin.
presentation.mediaEmpty: No media yet. Add some from Admin → Content → Presentation.

lore.title: Narrative block — sample
lore.body: This paragraph is a layout placeholder. After install, tell your server's story here or import copy from the admin panel.

lore.title: For GitHub visitors
lore.body: This live demo lets you click everywhere safely: forum, rules, shop and forms are prefilled to show the UI.

strengths: Admin to edit copy, navigation and theme
News and forum ready to use
Vercel deployment documented in the README

rules.title: Sample rules page (demo)
rules.subtitle: Fictional categories to show layout. Replace everything with your real rules from the admin.
rules.anchorHint: Tip: use URL anchors <example>#general</example> to share a section.

tabs.whitelistDesc: Player access — introduce yourself and your character.
tabs.staffDesc: Join the team: moderation, support, dev…

applications.title: Apply cleanly, with no friction
applications.subtitle: Sample forms: fields come from config. Add a Discord webhook to receive real applications.

shop.title: Shop grid (demo)
shop.subtitle: Fictional product cards to show badges, prices and perk lists. Connect your Tebex store in config.
shop.promoBanner: Sample promo banner — editable in messages or admin.

news.title: Patch notes, announcements, events
news.subtitle: Categories, featured posts and article pages ready for a future CMS.

article.notFoundHint: This slug does not exist in the current configuration.

gallery.title: Screenshots, videos, clips
gallery.subtitle: Category filters — replace visuals with your server captures.

stats.title: Oversight & transparency
stats.subtitle: Reusable cards + simple chart. Plug in a FiveM / DB API for live data.
stats.weeklyActivityHint: Example time series — replace with your aggregates.

contact.title: Support & FAQ
contact.subtitle: Got a question or a report? Message the staff without email — your message lands directly in the admin panel.

form.title: Message the staff
form.subtitle: No email needed. Staff will reply via Discord or in-game.
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Message sent to staff. You'll get a reply via Discord or in-game.

ticket.title: Ticket (visual)
ticket.subtitle: Future integration: Zendesk / Discord threads.
ticket.placeholder: This is a premium placeholder for your future workflows.

signup.subtitle: Username and password. The first account created becomes administrator automatically.
signup.firstAdminHintBefore: No account exists yet — signing up will create the site
signup.disclaimer: 100% local storage (browser). Passwords are hashed (SHA-256 + salt); this is meant for community sites, not highly sensitive data.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Pick up your profile and join the forum.

account.profileCardHint: Shown next to your forum posts.
account.passwordOAuthHint: This account is linked to an external service. Set a password to also sign in with username/password.
account.dangerHint: Permanent account deletion. The last administrator cannot be removed.
account.confirmDelete: Permanently delete your account? This cannot be undone.

accountErrors.oauth_use_provider: This account is linked to an external service. Use “Continue with…” instead.
accountErrors.cannot_demote_last_admin: Cannot remove admin access from the last admin account.
accountErrors.cannot_delete_last_admin: Cannot delete the last admin account.
accountErrors.oauth_already_linked: This {provider} account is already linked to @{username}.
accountErrors.password_required_before_unlink: Set a password first before removing this service.

authLinked.title: Linked accounts
authLinked.subtitle: Link Discord or your FiveM (Steam) identity to sign in again without a password.

authOAuth.externalDisabled: External login is disabled. Enable Discord or Steam in Admin → Integrations (and set AUTH_SECRET, DISCORD_CLIENT_ID/_SECRET).

gate.initBody: No account exists yet. Create the administrator account to access the panel.
gate.deniedBody: The admin panel is reserved for accounts with the « admin.access » permission.

header.title: Administration
header.subtitle: Edit branding without touching code. Changes are saved automatically in your browser (localStorage) and can be exported for deployment.

forumCatsCard.title: Forum categories
forumCatsCard.subtitle: Create, rename and restrict categories. Private categories only show to allowed roles.

forumLogsCard.title: Forum logs
forumLogsCard.subtitle: History of posts, edits, deletions and moderation. Includes a full forum export (categories, topics, logs, notifications).

forms.title: Forms (JSON)
forms.subtitle: Advanced edit: whitelist / staff / business. Validated on parse.
forms.hint: Tip: keep the structure (whitelist, staff, business — FormField arrays). Invalid JSON won't apply while parsing fails during typing.

integrations.title: OAuth, Steam & Tebex
integrations.subtitle: Enable public buttons and enter server keys directly from this panel.
integrations.serverKeysBody: Enter credentials here: they are written to .runtime/auth-config.json on the server (not in git) and read first by /api/auth/* routes.
integrations.tebexGenLinks: Generate /package/:id links if missing on product
integrations.envHint: If you prefer env vars: AUTH_SECRET, DISCORD_CLIENT_ID, DISCORD_CLIENT_SECRET, DISCORD_REDIRECT_URI (otherwise derived from origin). Discord Developer Portal callback URL = /api/auth/discord/callback.

authSecrets.writeDisabled: Editing is disabled in production. Set <monoAllow>ALLOW_RUNTIME_AUTH_CONFIG=true</monoAllow> on the server, or use <monoEnv>.env</monoEnv> directly.
authSecrets.hintAuthSecret: Random string (≥ 32 characters). Used to sign sessions.
authSecrets.hintDiscordRedirect: Must match exactly what you set in Discord Developer Portal.
authSecrets.hintSteamRealm: HTTPS origin of your site (otherwise derived automatically).
authSecrets.confirmReset: Clear runtime configuration (keys entered from the admin panel)?
authSecrets.tokenGeneratedBody: Keep it to edit the config later from another browser. It has been saved locally.
authSecrets.hintAdminToken: Paste the token returned on first write.
authSecrets.footerWrite: Writing requires a token from the first save, stored in your browser (
authSecrets.footerWriteAfter: ). Discord/Steam routes read these keys first, then fall back to classic environment variables.

help.intro: Useful links to create or find your keys. Everything is free.

discord.title: Discord — OAuth2 application
steps: Open the Discord Developer Portal (link below).
Click New Application and name it (e.g. your RP server).
OAuth2 → General: copy CLIENT ID and CLIENT SECRET (Reset Secret button).
discord.redirectIntro: Still under OAuth2, Redirects section, add exactly:

steam.title: Steam (FiveM) — OpenID 2.0
steps: No key required: Steam OpenID is public. The returned SteamID identifies FiveM players (who launch via Steam).
Optional: for a Steam Web API key (fetch display name / avatar), create one at steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey (a domain is required).
The Realm field is usually left empty: it will be derived from the site’s public URL.

authSecret.title: AUTH_SECRET — session signing key
steps: Generate a random string of at least 64 characters. Options:
Never share it; if it leaks, rotate it (all sessions will be invalidated).

tebex.title: Tebex — shop
steps: The base URL is the one shown in your Tebex back office (e.g. https://your-store.tebex.io).

server.liveSubtitle: Automatically sync player count, max and status from Cfx.re and/or your /players.json endpoint.
server.cfxHint: From your server page on servers.fivem.net — URL like servers.fivem.net/servers/detail/abcxyz. The code is the last segment.
server.playersHint: Native FiveM endpoint. Must be publicly reachable (IP + port, usually 30120). No loopback / LAN.
server.autoSyncHint: Poll live API on all pages.
server.probeNeedInput: Enter a Cfx.re code or /players.json URL first.
server.fallbackSubtitle: Used when live sync is off or unreachable.
server.socialSubtitle: URLs used in header, footer and hero buttons.

layoutCopy.announcementsSubtitle: Active announcements rotate at the top of the site.
layoutCopy.noAnnouncements: No announcements. Add one to show it in the top bar.
layoutCopy.announceTip: Tip: with 2+ active announcements, the bar cycles every 6 seconds (slide + fade). Hover to pause.
layoutCopy.textCssSubtitle: All fixed template copy (except long content like articles / rules). CSS is appended after theme variables.
layoutCopy.newAnnouncementDefault: New announcement — click to edit the text.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage accounts and roles. The first account created is administrator. Stored locally (browser).
users.footerHint: Configure each role in the Roles & permissions tab. You can also create new ranks (Helper, Streamer, VIP…).

roles.title: Roles & permissions
roles.subtitle: Create custom ranks (Helper, Streamer, VIP…) and fine-tune permissions. The 3 built-in roles (Admin / Moderator / Member) can be edited but not removed.
roles.label: Label
roles.accountsAssigned: {count, plural, one {# account assigned} other {# accounts assigned}}
roles.confirmDeleteWithUsers: Delete role « {label} »? {usage} account(s) will be moved to « Member ».

forumCategories.title: Forum categories
forumCategories.subtitle: Rename, describe and restrict access. {count, plural, one {# category.} other {# categories.}}
forumCategories.privateHint: Roles with forum.access_private can see all private categories, in addition to those checked below.
forumCategories.newDesc: Describe what this category is for.
forumCategories.deleteConfirm: Delete this category? Topics stay in storage but become orphaned.

support.title: Support messages
support.subtitle: Messages sent from the Contact page. Local to this browser, synced across tabs.
support.subject: Subject

forumLogs.journalSubtitle: All moderation and post actions are logged here (max 500 entries). {count, plural, one {# entry currently.} other {# entries currently.}}
forumLogs.clearConfirm: Clear the entire forum moderation log?

analytics.title: Analytics — page views
analytics.subtitle: Data is strictly local to this browser (nothing sent to a server).

tickets.title: RP tickets — moderation
tickets.subtitle: Local to this browser, synced across your tabs.

extensions.cardSubtitle: Enable, configure or buy extensions to enrich your site (forum modules, integrations, visual packs…).
extensions.installedCount: {count, plural, one {# extension installed on this instance.} other {# extensions installed on this instance.}}
extensions.dropzoneRestBefore: or click to pick a file. The archive must contain
extensions.manualHint: Paste extension JSON. Required fields: id, name, version.
extensions.emptyInstalled: No extensions installed yet. Browse the catalog below.
extensions.catalogSubtitle: Official extensions. An online marketplace is coming — you can already plan your slots.
extensions.guideTitle: How do I build my own extension?
extensions.guideIntroAfter: file (at the root of a zip) + optional React code that reads its settings.
extensions.guide1RulesAfter: at the root, not in a subfolder.
extensions.guide2Body: Drop the zip in the import area above, or paste JSON via “Import JSON”. The extension appears under Installed.
extensions.guide3Intro: In your code, create a React component that checks the extension and reads its settings:
extensions.guide4Body: Look at existing extensions for real examples: welcome-banner (simple), live-chat (BroadcastChannel), tickets-rp (dedicated store + admin), fivem-player-counter (fetch API + cache).
extensions.msgUninstallConfirm: Uninstall « {name} »? Its configuration will be lost.

listingPrep.title: Store listing & media
listingPrep.subtitle: Write the description, add cover art (local upload in dev, or paste a URL), then export JSON for the catalog or HTML for Tebex / Discord.
listingPrep.mediaHint: In local dev, uploads are saved under public/uploads/marketplace/. In production without the env flag, host the image elsewhere (Imgur, CDN) and paste the URL.
listingPrep.placeholderShort: E.g. Full UI pack for your RP hub…
listingPrep.placeholderLong:
First paragraph.

Second paragraph with details, deliverables…
listingPrep.previewEmpty: Fill the fields to see a preview.
listingPrep.howto1: Paste the JSON snippet into src/lib/extensions/catalog.ts (EXTENSION_CATALOG array), or use the Extensions tab import.
listingPrep.howto2: For Tebex: edit the product → description → HTML mode if needed → paste the copied block.
listingPrep.howto3: Remote images must be HTTPS. For a free zip bundle, put the file in public/ and link /your-file.zip.
listingPrep.howto4: On Vercel, disk upload is usually disabled: prefer an external image URL or static assets at build time.

content.rootSubtitle: Edit everything shown on public pages (About, Team, Rules, News, Shop, Gallery, FAQ, Stats, Contact).

presentation.featuresSubtitle: Shown on home and About page.
presentation.loreSubtitle: Narrative sections on the About page.
presentation.strengthsSubtitle: One line per bullet on the About page.
presentation.economySubtitle: Short paragraph about the server economy.
presentation.mediaSubtitle: Shown in the Media section. Mix images, local videos and YouTube.

stats.cardsSubtitle: Shown on home (preview) and Statistics page.
stats.seriesSubtitle: Data for the chart on the Statistics page.

staff.title: Team members
staff.subtitle: Shown on the Team page (in addition to admin/mod accounts if enabled in Modules).

rules.title: Rules
rules.subtitle: Categories and rules on the Rules page.

articles.title: News / articles
articles.subtitle: Shown on News, home and /news/[slug] pages.

boutique.title: Shop products
boutique.subtitle: Shown on the Shop page. If a Tebex URL is set, it is used directly.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Screenshots, videos and clips on the Gallery page.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions (usable on public pages).

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Support email and Discord channel for tickets (Contact page).

chrome.loreNewBody: Describe part of your universe here.
chrome.economyPlaceholder: Describe the economy in a few sentences.
chrome.mediaEmpty: No media. Use the buttons above to add some.

chrome.mediaHelpVideo: Video file URL (mp4, webm). Native `<video controls>` player.

chrome.staffNewBio: Introduce yourself in a few words.

# Title

Write content in markdown here.
chrome.boutiqueNewDesc: Describe the pack in a few lines.
chrome.phTebex: Tebex URL (leave empty to generate from ID)

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for has been moved, deleted, or never existed.

home.title: Forum
home.subtitle: Topics, replies and mutual aid between players. Messages are stored locally (JSON export to share).

disabled.title: Forum disabled
disabled.subtitle: The admin disabled the forum from the site configuration.
disabled.body: The forum module is disabled. Re-enable it from <admin>Administration</admin> → <mono>Modules</mono> tab → <mono>forum</mono> checkbox, then save the local configuration.

identityBar.notLogged: You're not logged in. Create an account to post on the forum.

category.privateReservedStaff: This category is reserved for staff.
category.roleCantPost: Your role doesn't allow creating topics
category.newTopicHintPrefix: The topic will be published in

category.errRole: Your role doesn't allow creating topics.

topic.privateBody: This category is reserved for certain roles.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyDescription: When someone replies to one of your topics, you'll see it here.
